zh.Middleton, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可米德萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales於1279年出生在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓時，他的父親Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales31歲，母親Isabella Burnell22歲。他於1309年與Egeline Courtenay在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年3月20日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米德萊頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.Middleton, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可米德萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales于1279年出生在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓时，他的父亲Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales31岁，母亲Isabella Burnell22岁。他于1309年与Egeline Courtenay在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年3月20日在英国英格兰諾福爾可米德萊頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Scales
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: plural form of   Scale  , naming a herdsman living and working on a summer pasture, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Scales, mostly minor places in Lancashire and Yorkshire.   Scholes   is a dialect variant of the same name.

(of Norman origin): habitational name either from Écalles-Alix (Seine-Maritime), Écalles (in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime), or from Escalles (Pas-de-Calais). The earliest spellings of these names suggest a derivation from Latin scala, scalae (plural) ‘ladder, staircase, stile’, perhaps applied to a steep slope or path, although Old Norse skáli (‘herdsman's hut, shieling’, see Scale ) has also been suggested for Écalles. Challis may be a variant of the same name. The surname has also been established in southern Ireland (Limerick) since the 14th century.

variants.name: Scholes
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the places called Scholes in Lancashire and Yorkshire, or from Scole in Norfolk, all named with Middle English scole or scoles ‘herdsman's hut(s)’ (Old Norse skáli). In northern England the name was sometimes interchangeable with Scales , a dialect variant of the same word.

variants.name: Scale
meanings: English: from northern Middle English scale ‘herdsman's hut, shed, shieling’ (Old Norse skáli). The surname may have denoted a herdsman who lived and worked on a summer pasture or someone from any of several mostly minor places so named in Lancashire and Yorkshire. The name often varies between singular and plural forms; see Scales .

variants.name: Schooley
meanings: English (Sussex): variant of Scholey, a habitational name either from Scholey's Bridge in Hemsworth (Yorkshire) or the lost Scholey in Rastrick (Yorkshire), recorded in that spelling in 1399. The placenames derive from Old Norse skáli ‘(temporary) hut, shed, shieling’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scales .

variants.name: Schoolcraft
meanings: English: variant of Scowcroft, from Middle English scale, sc(h)ole ‘hut, shed’ (Old Norse skáli) + croft ‘small enclosed field’. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a field containing a hut, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Scowcroft in Oldham (Lancashire) and Scholecroft in Morley (Yorkshire). Compare Scales and Schofield .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales was born in 1279, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales, was 31 and his mother, Isabella Burnell, was 22. He married Egeline Courtenay in 1309, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 March 1325, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales est né en 1279, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabella Burnell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Egeline Courtenay en 1309, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1325, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales 1279 in Middleton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales 31 und seine Mutter Isabella Burnell 22. Er hat 1309 in England Egeline Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1325 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Middleton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales è nato il nel 1279 nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Burnell, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Egeline Courtenay nel 1309, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1325, nel Middleton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Middleton, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクミッドレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scalesが1279年にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scalesは31歳，母Isabella Burnellは22歳であった。1309年にイギリスでEgeline Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年3月20日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales(이)가 1279년 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Burnell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1309년 영국에서 Egeline Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 3월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales nasceu em 1279, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Burnell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Egeline Courtenay em 1309, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1325, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales родился в 1279 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Burnell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Egeline Courtenay в 1309 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1325 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales nació en 1279, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabella Burnell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Egeline Courtenay en 1309, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1325, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
